data.title: Glion and Les Roches lead global hospitality education in the 2026 QS Rankings, setting Sommet Education apart with two top-ranked brands
data.description: Les Roches, a leading global hospitality education institution, has secured an impressive second place in the QS rankings, solidifying its position as a premier talent center for the hospitality industry. The institution boasts an impressive 94% employability rate, with graduates receiving an average of three to five job offers upon completing their studies.

data.title: S2 CAPITAL MAKES STRATEGIC PUSH INTO THE ATLANTA INDUSTRIAL MARKET WITH SENIOR HIRE
data.description: Danny Bernstein has been named as the Vice President of Acquisitions at S2 Capital, a real estate investment manager. The appointment, made on March 25, 2026, reflects S2 Capital's strategy for growth in Sunbelt markets. Known for its vertical integration approach, S2 Capital is expanding its presence in high-growth areas. This move underlines the company's commitment to enhancing its portfolio and seizing opportunities in the real estate sector.

data.title: HanchorBio Advances Toward TWSE Innovation Board Listing to Accelerate Global Clinical Development, Platform Expansion, and International Partnering
data.description: HanchorBio, Inc. (TPEx: 7827), based in Taipei, Shanghai, and San Francisco, has reached significant milestones in their journey. These achievements are propelling the company towards enhancing institutional recognition, progressing their innovative FBDB™ platform, and broadening their expanding pipeline focused on oncology and various immune-mediated diseases. The developments took place on March 25, 2026, indicating a positive trajectory for the company's growth and impact in the biopharmaceutical sector.

data.title: THE AMLON GROUP STRENGTHENS INDUSTRIAL WASTE MANAGEMENT CAPABILITIES WITH SECOND ADD-ON ACQUISITION SINCE CONTINUATION VEHICLE CLOSE
data.description: A recent announcement by Heartwood Partners revealed that The Amlon Group has successfully acquired the assets of Lion Industrial Resources, LLC., a company based in Channelview, Texas. Lion, founded in 2007, is now under the ownership of Amlon. The specifics of the financial transactions or the exact date of the acquisition were not provided.
ACT Energy Technologies Reports Fourth Quarter and Annual 2025 Results

data.title: New NIH-Funded Study from Southern California University of Health Sciences Finds More Than 100-Fold Variation in Medicare Acupuncture Access Across U.S. States
data.description: New research findings released by Southern California University of Health Sciences (SCU) on March 25, 2026, analyzed Medicare Part B data from 2020 to 2023 following a federal coverage decision for chronic low back pain. The analysis highlighted significant geographic disparities in the utilization of Medicare services. The study emphasized the importance of addressing these disparities, showcasing a need for focused efforts to ensure equitable access to healthcare services. The findings point to the necessity of targeted interventions in regions experiencing limited utilization rates. The data revealed variations in Medicare service usage across different locations, underscoring the importance of tailored approaches to healthcare delivery. This research sheds light on the impact of policy decisions on healthcare access, urging policymakers to consider regional disparities in healthcare utilization.

data.title: WealthHawk Joins FSI's CoveredAdvisor Affinity Benefits Program, Bringing Money-in-Motion Intelligence to Independent Advisors
data.description: WealthHawk, a financial advisor-focused money-in-motion intelligence platform based in Newport Beach, California, recently disclosed its acceptance into the CoveredAdvisor Affinity Benefits Program by the Financial Services Institute (FSI). This partnership with FSI signifies a significant milestone for WealthHawk, providing it with valuable connections and opportunities within the financial services industry. This announcement came on March 25, 2026, showcasing the latest advancement for WealthHawk in expanding its reach and impact.

data.title: SANY Debuts World's First Intelligent Hybrid Pump Truck
data.description: In Shanghai on March 25, 2026, SANY hosted a product unveiling with the theme "Embracing a New Era with Innovative Intelligent-Electric Technology" in China, showcasing the groundbreaking global debut of an intelligent hybrid pump truck. Additionally, a range of new intelligent-electric models was introduced at the event.

data.title: Allooloo Technologies Corp. Deploys ACM-68000 -- Agentic Hyperscaler Signals Now Open Source
data.description: Allooloo Technologies Corp. unveiled a new signal standard called ACM-68000 designed to prevent A2A drift with a 7-signal stack. The technology aims to address the challenges of SKU movement by offering a solution based on agentic hyperscaler principles. The announcement was made in Vancouver, BC and Barcelona, Spain on March 25, 2026.

data.title: Polygon aims for $0.45 by Apr 2026 after trading at $0.38 now, with RSI at 38. Potential recovery in 4-6 weeks if support holds.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Polygon (MATIC) is currently trading at $0.38, showing a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 38. According to technical analysis, there is a possibility of a recovery to the $0.45 resistance level in the next 4-6 weeks if the crucial support level remains intact.

data.title: Bitcoin Worth $35 Million Tied To Drug Dealer Moves After A Decade Of Dormancy, Reports On-Chain Analytics Firm—Who Gained Access?
data.description: An inactive Bitcoin stash associated with Irish drug dealer Clifton Collins, previously considered unrecoverable, was suddenly transferred on Thursday. Arkham Intelligence detected the move, revealing that 500 BTC, equivalent to $35.43 million, was sent to an unknown address before being forwarded to a Coinbase Prime wallet. The wallet, titled "Clifton Collins: Lost Keys," had not been accessed for a decade. Presently, the wallet still contains 5,500 BTC valued at around $391 million. This development marks a significant shift in a dormant cryptocurrency holding initially thought to be lost. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Polkadot aims for $1.44 rebound after technical consolidation, near $1.39 Bollinger Band support. Key levels determine short-term direction.
data.description: The prediction for the price of DOT suggests a possible rebound to the $1.44 resistance level. Currently, Polkadot is trading close to the Bollinger Band support at $1.39. The critical levels are at play in determining the short-term trajectory of the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Oil Prices Tumble On U.S. Peace Plan To Iran; 7 Stocks To Watch
data.description: Futures experienced an uptick while oil prices dropped after reports of the U.S. sending a peace proposal to Iran. President Trump expressed optimism, stating Tehran seemed to be rational in discussions. The Dow Jones Futures saw an increase, contrary to the decline in oil prices. Investors are closely monitoring 7 specific stocks in light of these developments.

data.title: QS World University Rankings by Subject 2026
data.description: QS Quacquarelli Symonds, a global higher education organization, recently published its sixteenth edition of the QS World University Rankings by Subject. The report compares over 21,000 academic programs from more than 1900 institutions worldwide. This year, the rankings cover 55 different subjects, providing valuable insights for students and educators. The extensive research conducted by QS offers a comprehensive overview of the academic landscape, with data collected from over 100 countries. The rankings serve as a crucial tool for prospective students and researchers, aiding them in making informed decisions about their academic pursuits.
